## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential SEO and growth strategies for Mastra, a JavaScript-first AI agent framework.](https://fathom.video/share/yVJzstX_-_RB6ZqjaakqxwxJfxZvKP_s?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Mastra aims to become the dominant JavaScript agent framework, competing with LangChain](https://fathom.video/share/yVJzstX_-_RB6ZqjaakqxwxJfxZvKP_s?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Current focus: Grow open-source adoption (30-50x increase in downloads over 11 months)](https://fathom.video/share/yVJzstX_-_RB6ZqjaakqxwxJfxZvKP_s?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [SEO strategy needed: Increase non-brand traffic by 30-50% to drive adoption](https://fathom.video/share/yVJzstX_-_RB6ZqjaakqxwxJfxZvKP_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Potential collaboration with GrowthX for innovative marketing and community-building approaches](https://fathom.video/share/yVJzstX_-_RB6ZqjaakqxwxJfxZvKP_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)

## Topics

### Mastra's Current Status and Goals

  - [Raised $12 million in Series A funding](https://fathom.video/share/yVJzstX_-_RB6ZqjaakqxwxJfxZvKP_s?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [Targeting JavaScript developers building AI agents/assistants](https://fathom.video/share/yVJzstX_-_RB6ZqjaakqxwxJfxZvKP_s?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [Aiming for 300,000-400,000 monthly downloads by February (currently at \~12,000)](https://fathom.video/share/yVJzstX_-_RB6ZqjaakqxwxJfxZvKP_s?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [Primary goal: Win the open-source framework race against competitors like LangChain](https://fathom.video/share/yVJzstX_-_RB6ZqjaakqxwxJfxZvKP_s?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### SEO and Growth Challenges

  - [Limited search volume for specific AI agent terms](https://fathom.video/share/yVJzstX_-_RB6ZqjaakqxwxJfxZvKP_s?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [Current traffic mostly brand-driven (e.g., "TypeScript agent framework")](https://fathom.video/share/yVJzstX_-_RB6ZqjaakqxwxJfxZvKP_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)
  - [Need to expand topical authority and create more discoverable content](https://fathom.video/share/yVJzstX_-_RB6ZqjaakqxwxJfxZvKP_s?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
  - [Opportunity to improve showcase/template pages for better SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/yVJzstX_-_RB6ZqjaakqxwxJfxZvKP_s?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)

### Potential Strategies and Collaboration

  - [Enhance showcase with user-generated content, auto-enrichment, and SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/yVJzstX_-_RB6ZqjaakqxwxJfxZvKP_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
  - [Repurpose book content into various formats for increased visibility](https://fathom.video/share/yVJzstX_-_RB6ZqjaakqxwxJfxZvKP_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
  - [Explore creative approaches like contests, bounties, or rewards to drive engagement](https://fathom.video/share/yVJzstX_-_RB6ZqjaakqxwxJfxZvKP_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
  - [Leverage GrowthX's expertise in programmatic SEO and community building](https://fathom.video/share/yVJzstX_-_RB6ZqjaakqxwxJfxZvKP_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
  - [Consider adjacent marketing work streams to complement core SEO efforts](https://fathom.video/share/yVJzstX_-_RB6ZqjaakqxwxJfxZvKP_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

### GrowthX's Expertise and Offerings

  - [Team includes former TechCrunch editor and SEO experts from major companies](https://fathom.video/share/yVJzstX_-_RB6ZqjaakqxwxJfxZvKP_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)
  - [Experience with developer-focused products (e.g., Unstructured, StackBlitz, Webflow)](https://fathom.video/share/yVJzstX_-_RB6ZqjaakqxwxJfxZvKP_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)
  - [Capabilities in content strategy, user-generated content, and SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/yVJzstX_-_RB6ZqjaakqxwxJfxZvKP_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sam to add Marcel and Bruno to Mastra's Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/yVJzstX_-_RB6ZqjaakqxwxJfxZvKP_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1834.0)
  - [Marcel to consider potential strategies over the weekend](https://fathom.video/share/yVJzstX_-_RB6ZqjaakqxwxJfxZvKP_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1856.0)
  - [Continue discussions over the next 1-2 weeks to refine collaboration approach](https://fathom.video/share/yVJzstX_-_RB6ZqjaakqxwxJfxZvKP_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1840.0)
  - [Explore flexible engagement models that align with Mastra's core focus and goals](https://fathom.video/share/yVJzstX_-_RB6ZqjaakqxwxJfxZvKP_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1840.0)
